street.description: Street or way on which the safety zone lies

extent.description: 'entire_street' when the entry is a bare street name with no endpoints; 'segment' when the zone is bounded

from_point.description: Street or way at (or measured from) which the segment begins; empty only for entire_street rows

from_offset_feet.description: Offset in feet from from_point to the actual segment start, from 'a point N feet DIR of X'; empty when the segment begins at from_point itself

from_offset_direction.description: Compass bearing of the offset from from_point; present iff from_offset_feet is present. Inline enum pending a common#compass_point def (see spec, Proposed common vocabulary)

to_point.description: Street or way at (or measured from) which the segment ends; empty only for entire_street rows

to_offset_feet.description: Offset in feet from to_point to the actual segment end, from 'a point N feet DIR of Y'; empty when the segment ends at to_point itself

to_offset_direction.description: Compass bearing of the offset from to_point; present iff to_offset_feet is present. Inline enum pending a common#compass_point def (see spec, Proposed common vocabulary)

location_detail.description: Positional qualifier from the source that does not decompose into the endpoint columns; empty for every entry as of revision 2025-04-11

notes.description: Extractor remarks about anomalies in the source text; never carries data
